metadata.description: Environment name: dev, staging, or prod. Drives resource naming and default configurations.
Primary Azure region. Choose a region that supports Azure OpenAI and AI Search. See: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/ai-services/openai/concepts/models#model-summary-table-and-region-availability
Your Dataverse environment URL, e.g., https://contoso.crm.dynamics.com
Microsoft App ID from your Entra app registration for the Bot Service. Create a single-tenant app registration in Azure Portal > Entra ID > App registrations.
App Service Plan SKU. Recommended: S1 for staging, P1v3 for production. Options: B1, B2, B3, S1, S2, S3, P1v3, P2v3, P3v3
Azure OpenAI model deployments. Capacity is in thousands of tokens per minute (TPM). Adjust capacity based on expected workload. The embedding model is required for AI Search vector indexing.
Azure AI Search SKU. Recommended: basic for dev, standard for production. Options: basic, standard, standard2, standard3
Number of AI Search replicas. Use 2+ for production high availability. Maximum: 12.
Redis Cache SKU. Recommended: Basic for dev, Standard for staging, Premium for production (adds persistence and VNet support). Options: Basic, Standard, Premium
Redis capacity. For Basic/Standard (C-family): 0-6. For Premium (P-family): 1-5.
Bot Service SKU. F0 is free tier (10K messages/month). S1 for production (unlimited messages). Options: F0, S1
Display name for the bot shown in Microsoft Teams and M365 Copilot.
Log Analytics workspace data retention in days. Range: 30-730. 90 days recommended for production.
Tags applied to all deployed resources. Update the 'customer' tag with your organization name for cost tracking.
